positive: A whimsical, forest scene featuring a group of friendly, stylized woodland creatures (fox, owl, badger) gathered around a glowing mushroom circle. The style should be reminiscent of Beatrix Potter meets modern children's book illustration, soft watercolor textures, pastel palette, inviting and warm atmosphere.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, dark, scary, harsh lines, photorealistic
